heading: Cooperation in carrying out Convention
label: 971g Cooperation in carrying out Convention
notes: Territorial Sea of United StatesFor extension of territorial sea of United States, see Proc. No. 5928, set out as a note under , Public Lands.section 1331 of Title 43

children.heading: Federal and State agencies; private institutions and organizations
children.label: a Federal and State agencies; private institutions and organizations
children.text: The United States Commissioners, through the Secretary of State and with the concurrence of the agency, institution, or organization concerned, may arrange for the cooperation of agencies of the United States Government, and of State and private institutions and organizations in carrying out the provisions of article IV of the Convention.

children.heading: Scientific and other programs; facilities and personnel
children.label: b Scientific and other programs; facilities and personnel
children.text: All agencies of the Federal Government are authorized, upon the request of the Commission, to cooperate in the conduct of scientific and other programs, and to furnish facilities and personnel for the purpose of assisting the Commission in carrying out its duties under the Convention.

children.heading: Fishing operations and biological experiments
children.label: c Fishing operations and biological experiments
children.text: None of the prohibitions deriving from this chapter, or contained in the laws or regulations of any State, shall prevent the Commission from conducting or authorizing the conduct of fishing operations and biological experiments at any time for purposes of scientific investigation, or shall prevent the Commission from discharging any other duties prescribed by the Convention.

children.heading: State jurisdiction; preemption by Federal regulations
children.label: d State jurisdiction; preemption by Federal regulations

children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2) of this subsection, nothing in this chapter shall be construed so as to diminish or to increase the jurisdiction of any State in the territorial sea of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: has not, within a reasonable period of time after the promulgation of regulations pursuant to this chapter, enacted laws or promulgated regulations which implement any such recommendation of the Commission within the boundaries of such State; or

children.label: B
children.text: has enacted laws or promulgated regulations which (i) are less restrictive than the regulations promulgated pursuant to this chapter, or (ii) are not effectively enforced.

children.heading: Continuing review of State laws and regulations
children.label: e Continuing review of State laws and regulations
children.text: To insure that the purposes of subsection (d) are carried out, the Secretary shall undertake a continuing review of the laws and regulations of all States to which subsection (d) applies or may apply and the extent to which such laws and regulations are enforced.
